title: Khalid ibn el Walid
writer: Ahmed El Shorbasy, Hussein El-Mohandess, Mohamed Othman
actors: Nahed Abdelaziz, Zeinab Abdelaziz, Ahmed Allam
plot: The story of Khalid Ibn Al-Walid (592-642) the greatest military leader in the dawn of Islam during the life of prophet Muhammad and his caliphs Abu Bakr and Omar.
